sections: Task 2: Apply the canonical contract/dock design freeze
Task 3: Run the complete proof and regression wall
Task 4: Obtain fresh independent final review and resolve accepted blockers
HCM-0.4 crate ownership and dependency contract

repo_truth: Review the exact manifest against baseline HEAD fc4e19e84385063c1ca3678e730c7d3b9e604ad8. The tracked diff modifies canonical 00-06 only; the packet files are unchanged. The manifest also contains the bounded landing dispatch and the parent proof capture. The proof capture records 61 balanced fences, 49 parsed JSON/YAML examples with duplicate-key rejection, 10 resolved relative links, all three handoff validator modes, archive checks, diff hygiene, and GitNexus low-risk/zero-process change detection. Treat those as results to verify, not as a review conclusion. Contract membrane and External docks are currently TargetOnly and all runtime gates are open.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only. Replay every manifest entry and aggregate before review.

Inspect the complete HCM-0.5 packet, the complete current contract/dock sections, the seven-file diff from HEAD, the proof capture, and only the named frozen dependency sections needed to test regressions.
Run read-only Markdown, link, anchor, fenced-example, semantic-table, Git, archive, handoff, and GitNexus checks needed to validate the subject and proof.
Return findings-first structured review to the parent through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.
Do not require Rust, Cargo, schema/runtime implementation, running dock proof, HCM-0.6 work, HCM-0.9 repair, catalog leaves, or unrelated architecture cleanup.
Do not redesign frozen HCM-0.2/HCM-0.3/HCM-0.4 semantics or infer shipped defaults.
Do not treat the landing agent result or proof PASS labels as independent review evidence; inspect live bytes and replay checks.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order and remain read-only.
Replay the sorted manifest and aggregate fingerprint; stop if any entry differs.

Review correctness and cross-document cohesion of exact contract definition identity/SemVer compatibility, immutable lifecycle/authority, claims/applicability, evidence qualification/cardinality/freshness/provenance/Resolution/consistency, verdict partition, gate precedence/scoring, and local-versus-parent eligibility.

Review the exact dock manifest/implementation-bundle/runtime-closure identity, host verification, capability intersection, one-shot JSON framing, result/host-outcome split, isolation/no-network, timeout/cancellation/refusal/crash/cleanup, candidate admission, and validator-as-witness authority.
Verify handbook.dock.json-schema@1.0.0 is justified and bounded without claiming implementation or runtime proof.
Verify all 12 ordinary operations preserve frozen HCM-0.4 owner/DTO/transport/idempotency/receipt rules and the pre-admission/admitted-run/candidate-admission matrix is coherent and crash-resumable.

Verify canonical 00-06, packet, proof gate, seam classifications, Phase-5 sequencing, open runtime gates, no-HCM-0.6 boundary, HCM-0.9 monolith boundary, and final status wording agree without overclaim.
Independently replay the proof capture sufficiently to detect fabricated, incomplete, or non-reproducible evidence; verify negative/refusal coverage and byte/scope integrity.

Report findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit. Each finding must include severity, exact file/line, violated packet contract/invariant/gate, why it is wrong, smallest valid in-scope remediation, and missing verification.
Return CLEAN only if no valid Critical or Required finding remains. Otherwise return CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED with typed findings and no edits.
contracts_and_gates: Documentation freeze only: no runtime classification or PG-CONTRACT-01/PG-DOCK-01/PG-GATE-01 promotion.
Lifecycle and evaluation state remain separate; all identities and transitions are exact, immutable, closed, and fail-closed.
Applicability precedes evidence; all-of evidence uses exact kind/case/cardinality/freshness/provenance/six-dimension Resolution and repeated-consistency semantics.
Every claim is partitioned exactly once; hard/required non-pass and invalid bindings outrank scores; local closeout and parent promotion are separate.
Dock execution has no semantic authority; candidates become canonical only through membrane admission; no non-completed outcome yields evidence.
Process v1 is exact-bundle/runtime-closure, direct-spawn, bounded one-document JSON, default-deny, and unconditionally network-denied.
Frozen HCM-0.2/HCM-0.3/HCM-0.4 semantics, HCM-0.9 monolith abandonment, packet bytes, and HCM-0.6 boundary remain intact.
Blocking threshold: Critical and Required findings block; Optional and Nit do not unless they expose a violated required contract.
stop_conditions: Stop with BLOCKED if the manifest cannot replay, required authority is contradictory, or required proof cannot be evaluated read-only.
Do not modify repository state or create orchestration artifacts.
Do not widen into runtime implementation, sibling slices, shipped-default decisions, or abandoned catalog decomposition.
